hook.text: This is how we treat woman's health issues
hook.target_audience_raw: women with undiagnosed endometriosis or chronic pelvic pain

main_claim.text: Putting women on birth control pills to treat painful periods without proper diagnosis is not a solution and leads to misdiagnosis of endometriosis.

supporting_explanation.summary: The speaker shares a personal story of trying five different pills to treat heavy periods, hormonal acne, and pain, none of which provided lasting relief, highlighting how this approach overlooks underlying endometriosis.

funnel_rationale: Educates about a pervasive issue in women's health, targeting broad audience unaware of endometriosis misdiagnosis, building awareness before diagnosis or treatment.
